headline: The TJX Companies, Inc. Announces Quarterly Common Stock Dividend
summary: FRAMINGHAM, Mass., June 09, 2026--The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TJX) today announced the declaration of a quarterly dividend on its common stock of $.48 per share payable September 3, 2026, to shareholders of record on August 13, 2026.

headline: Will Stronger-Than-Expected Comps and New Debt Shelf Shape TJX Companies' (TJX) Investment Narrative?
summary: In late May 2026, The TJX Companies, Inc. filed a shelf registration for debt securities and reported a 6% comparable sales increase driven by higher customer transactions across major regions and income groups. Alongside these results, insider share sales and upbeat commentary on TJX’s value-and-selection proposition underscored how its off-price model is resonating as other retailers work through excess inventory. With that backdrop, we’ll now explore how TJX’s stronger-than-expected...
